metadata.author: Core Team
metadata.description: Place the stack block, choose one operation, and run it. Only one action should happen: remove the top of A.

introduces: placing one structure block, selecting an operation, and executing it

messages.title: Place the stack block and choose an operation
messages.body: Look at the initial and goal boards first. The only difference is that the top value of A disappears. Drag structure A into the program, choose an operation for it, then press Play and watch what happens.

messages.title: One operation changes the stack, one only looks at it
messages.body: In this level, one available operation inspects the stack and the other one changes it. Compare the board after running and choose the operation that actually removes the top.

messages.title: Match the exact visible difference
messages.body: The goal board is missing exactly one value: the current top of A. Use the operation that removes that top value, then run again and observe the board.
